//-overview: Build: pnpm builds the Next.js app at apps/web; output is auto-detected.
Functions: api/index.py wraps the FastAPI app as a single Python function.
Rewrite: /api/* on the frontend forwards to the function so the browser
client (which talks to a relative origin) never needs CORS.

api/index.py.//-maxDuration: Hobby tier caps at 60s. Long Q&A streams may hit this — fine for demo.
//-includeFiles: Vercel's Python bundler only ships files imported from the entrypoint.
FastAPI imports submodules dynamically (`include_router` chains) so we
explicitly include the whole apps/api and apps/ml trees. Globs use
POSIX paths regardless of host OS.

rewrites.//: Browser fetches `/api/v1/...` → routed to the FastAPI function. Order matters: this must precede the Next.js catch-all, which Vercel handles automatically.

//-env-note: Environment variables are configured per-Vercel-project in the dashboard, not here — putting secrets in vercel.json would commit them to git.
